headline: JCP&L Encourages Customers to Explore Energy Bill Assistance Options
summary: Seasonal temperature shifts can lead to higher energy use – and higher bills. With the New Jersey Winter Termination Program ending recently, Jersey Central Power & Light (JCP&L), a FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) electric company, is here to help with programs that make managing your energy costs easier throughout the year.
